title: selaginella chaii
intro: Selaginella chaii, also known as the 'Indian Spikemoss', is a species of spikemoss, a type of small, non-vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Selaginella chaii include its ability to reduce stress, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Selaginella chaii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
